jobs.description: Compares a physical inventory count against system records and flags mismatches worth investigating. Use this if shrinkage or data entry errors have ever gone unnoticed until a full audit months later.

jobs.name: Inventory Shrinkage Watch
jobs.description: Tracks the gap between expected and actual inventory over time and flags when shrinkage (theft, damage, data-entry error) crosses a threshold. Use this if shrinkage has ever only gotten noticed at the annual physical count instead of trending visibly for months first.

jobs.name: Inventory Waste Log Review
jobs.description: Reviews the kitchen's waste log for the week and flags which items are being tossed most, in case it's an over-ordering or portioning problem. Use this if food cost keeps creeping up and nobody's sure why.

jobs.name: Invoice Overdue Check
jobs.description: Flags invoices that are past due and still unpaid. Use this if you freelance or run a small business and invoices have ever slipped through the cracks.

jobs.name: Irrigation Need Check
jobs.description: Checks recent rainfall and forecast against a soil-moisture threshold to tell you whether irrigation is actually needed today. Use this if you've ever watered on a fixed schedule and either wasted water after rain or under-watered during a dry stretch.

jobs.name: ISBN Registration Tracker
jobs.description: Flags upcoming titles that don't yet have an ISBN assigned and registered with the relevant agency, checked against their planned publication date. Use this if a title has ever hit its pub date without an ISBN because registration wasn't started early enough.

jobs.name: Job Posting Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks open job postings against their planned expiry or repost date and flags any that have gone stale on a job board. Use this if a posting has ever sat expired for weeks before anyone noticed applications had quietly stopped coming in.

jobs.name: Jobsite Safety Incident & Near-Miss Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews recently logged safety incidents and near-misses across active sites for repeat causes, escalating severity, or a site racking up more reports than its peers. Use this if a serious incident has ever happened after a string of smaller near-misses that, in hindsight, pointed right at it.

jobs.name: Kubernetes Pod Restart Watch
jobs.description: Checks for pods with a high restart count and flags them. Use this if a crash-looping pod has ever burned through hours before anyone noticed it wasn't actually staying up.

jobs.name: Kitchen Ticket Time Watch
jobs.description: Reviews kitchen display system ticket times (fire to plate-up) and flags stations or dayparts running consistently slower than target. Use this if slow ticket times have ever driven complaints or comps before anyone traced it back to a specific station falling behind.

jobs.name: Knowledge Base Article Staleness Check
jobs.description: Flags published help center articles that haven't been reviewed or updated in a long time. Use this if a stale article has ever kept giving customers outdated instructions because nobody was tracking when it was last touched.

jobs.name: Lab Result Follow-Up Check
jobs.description: Checks for lab results that came back a while ago but haven't been reviewed by a provider or communicated to the patient yet. Use this if a result has ever sat in a queue for days because nobody was tracking turnaround from result-received to patient-notified.

jobs.name: Lab Result Turnaround Check
jobs.description: Checks which submitted lab orders still have no result logged past their expected turnaround time. Use this if a sample has ever sat at an outside lab for a week with nobody following up because no one was tracking orders against their expected turnaround.

jobs.name: Labor Cost Percentage Watch
jobs.description: Checks labor cost as a percentage of sales against your target and flags it when it runs high. Use this if overstaffing on a slow shift has ever quietly eaten a week's margin before anyone pulled the labor numbers and noticed.

jobs.name: Warehouse Labor Productivity Rate Check
jobs.description: Compares units processed per labor hour against a target rate, by shift or work area. Use this if a shift's productivity has ever quietly drifted below what staffing was planned around, without anyone noticing until the labor budget was already blown for the month.

jobs.name: Landlord Insurance Claim Status Check
jobs.description: Tracks open property insurance claims and flags any that haven't had a status update within a set number of days. Use this if a claim has ever gone quiet for weeks with the adjuster because nobody was following up on where it stood.

jobs.name: Lapsed Donor Check
jobs.description: Flags donors who gave before but haven't in a while, before they're fully lost. Use this if lapsed-donor outreach only happens during the annual campaign instead of catching people while it's still recoverable.

jobs.name: Last-Mile Delivery Exception Check
jobs.description: Checks recent deliveries for exceptions — failed attempts, refused packages, address issues — and flags them for follow-up. Use this if a failed delivery has ever sat unresolved until an annoyed customer emailed asking where their order was.

jobs.name: Late Fee & Interest Accrual Risk Check
jobs.description: Estimates the dollar cost of leaving an overdue bill unpaid by projecting late fees and accrued interest against its grace period. Use this if you want to know what an overdue balance is actually costing you, not just that it's overdue (see accounts-payable-aging-check for the plain aging list).

jobs.name: Layaway & Special Order Pickup Tracker
jobs.description: Flags layaway and special-order items that have been ready for pickup past a set number of days. Use this if a paid-for special order has ever sat in the back room for weeks because nobody was tracking pickup age, only whether the item had arrived.

jobs.name: Lead Response Time Check
jobs.description: Flags new inbound leads that haven't gotten a first response within your target window. Use this if you've ever lost a hot lead simply because nobody replied fast enough.

jobs.name: Lease Expiry Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a lease ends so there's time to renew, renegotiate, or start looking. Use this if a lease has ever gone month-to-month, or ended, without anyone noticing the date was coming.

jobs.name: Lease Renewal Offer Window Check
jobs.description: Flags leases approaching expiry where no renewal offer has been sent yet, so tenants get a decision window before they start apartment hunting elsewhere. Use this if a good tenant has ever given notice to leave simply because nobody proactively offered them a renewal in time.

jobs.name: End-of-Lease Vehicle Return Condition Check
jobs.description: Reviews vehicles approaching lease-end and flags condition issues (excess mileage, damage, missing equipment) that could trigger return fees, giving time to fix them before turn-in. Use this if a leased vehicle has ever come back with a surprise excess-wear bill because nobody inspected it until the leasing company did.

jobs.name: Leave of Absence Return Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks employees on FMLA, parental, medical, or other formal leave and flags upcoming or overdue return dates. Use this if a return-to-work date has ever been missed — either the team wasn't ready for someone coming back, or nobody noticed an expected return date came and went with no check-in.

jobs.name: Legal Document Retention Purge Review
jobs.description: Checks contracts and legal documents against their retention schedule and flags anything past its retention period as eligible for archival or destruction review. Use this if signed contracts and legal files have ever piled up indefinitely because nobody was checking them against how long the business's own retention policy actually requires keeping them.

jobs.name: Dependency License Compliance Check
jobs.description: Scans your dependencies for licenses you've flagged as risky (like GPL or AGPL). Use this if you've ever shipped something and only later found out a dependency's license doesn't play well with your product.

jobs.name: Staff License/Credential Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks a tracked list of staff licenses, certifications, or credentials (e.g. nursing license, CPR cert, DEA registration) and warns before any expire. Use this if you've ever had a provider accidentally see patients on a lapsed license or certification.

jobs.name: Esthetician/Cosmetologist License Renewal Tracker
jobs.description: Warns before a staff member's state license, certification, or continuing-education deadline lapses. Use this if a technician has ever shown up ready to work a shift, only to discover their license expired last month and they can't legally touch a client.

jobs.name: Lien Waiver Collection Tracker
jobs.description: Checks that a signed lien waiver was collected from each subcontractor before their next payment goes out, so payments never run ahead of the paperwork that protects against a mechanic's lien. Use this if a subcontractor has ever been paid without a waiver on file, leaving the project exposed to a lien claim on money that was already paid out.

jobs.name: Linehaul Transit Time Variance Check
jobs.description: Compares actual transit times against the scheduled transit time per lane and flags lanes running consistently slow. Use this if a lane's transit times have ever crept up gradually until service levels quietly missed the mark for a whole quarter.

jobs.name: Linen and Laundry Inventory Turnover Check
jobs.description: Checks par levels for linens (sheets, towels, robes) against current counted stock and flags anything below par or showing an unusually high loss/shrink rate versus rooms serviced. Use this if a linen shortage has ever forced housekeeping to hold rooms because nobody reordered before the closet ran low.

jobs.name: Link Capacity Threshold Alert
jobs.description: Checks a link's current bandwidth utilization against a warning threshold so you can upgrade capacity before customers notice congestion. Use this if a trunk or uplink has ever saturated during peak hours and the first sign anyone saw was a flood of slow-speed complaints.

jobs.name: Liquor Pour Cost Variance Check
jobs.description: Compares each bottle's theoretical usage (from drinks sold) against actual bottle depletion from inventory counts, and flags bottles showing a variance that points to over-pouring, spillage, or theft. Use this if the bar's overall liquor cost percentage looks fine but you suspect a specific bottle is walking off faster than it's rung up.

jobs.name: Litigation Hold Acknowledgment Tracker
jobs.description: Checks active litigation hold notices against the custodian list and flags anyone who hasn't acknowledged receipt yet. Use this if a litigation hold has ever gone out and nobody could later prove every custodian actually got and confirmed it, which is exactly what gets picked apart in a spoliation motion.

jobs.name: Livestock Feed Stock Check
jobs.description: Checks how many days of feed are left based on current stock and daily consumption, and warns before you run out. Use this if feed has ever run low over a weekend or holiday when the supplier wasn't reachable.

jobs.name: Loan Covenant Compliance Check
jobs.description: Computes financial ratios required by a loan agreement (e.g. debt service coverage, current ratio) from your latest financials and flags any that breach the covenant threshold. Use this if a lender requires you to maintain certain ratios and a breach could trigger default or a call on the loan.

jobs.name: Loaner Fleet Availability Check
jobs.description: Checks how many loaner vehicles are currently available against tomorrow's scheduled service appointments that requested one, and flags a shortfall before it becomes a counter argument. Use this if a customer has ever shown up for a scheduled loaner only to be told the fleet was already fully checked out.

jobs.name: Loaner Vehicle Return Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a loaner vehicle is due back, and flags anything already overdue. Use this if a loaner has ever gone weeks without coming back because nobody was tracking who had which car out.

jobs.name: Locker Rental Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks rented lockers against their expiry date and flags the ones coming due soon. Use this if a member's belongings have ever been cleared out of a locker without warning because the rental quietly lapsed.

jobs.name: Old Log File Cleanup
jobs.description: Deletes old log files so they don't quietly fill up your disk. Use this if your app or server writes logs to a folder and nobody's manually clearing them out.

jobs.name: Log Forwarding Health Check
jobs.description: Checks that logs are still actually arriving at your log aggregator. Use this if a log shipper has ever silently died and nobody found out until they needed logs that were never collected.

jobs.name: Loss Ratio by Line of Business Monitor
jobs.description: Calculates the incurred loss ratio for each line of business and flags any line running hotter than target, so underwriting or pricing can react before a bad quarter turns into a bad year. Use this if a line's loss ratio has ever drifted well past target for months before anyone noticed in the numbers.

jobs.name: Lost and Found Item Aging Check
jobs.description: Checks logged lost-and-found items against your retention policy and flags any that are old enough to donate, discard, or ship back to a guest. Use this if a lost-and-found closet has ever turned into a pile nobody knows what to do with because items just sat there indefinitely.

jobs.name: Lot Traceability Audit
jobs.description: Spot-checks that finished-goods lots have complete genealogy back to their raw material lots and process records. Use this if a recall has ever turned into a scramble because a lot's traceability records had gaps nobody caught until they were needed under pressure.

jobs.name: Low Stock Alert
jobs.description: Checks a general-purpose inventory database (warehouse, retail backroom, restaurant supplies — anything with a quantity and a set reorder point) against that fixed threshold and flags what's running low. Use this for physical stock tracked in a database, not tied to online sales; if you specifically need SKU reorder timing driven by e-commerce sales velocity and supplier lead time, see `low-stock-reorder-alert` instead.

jobs.name: Low Stock Reorder Alert
jobs.description: Checks inventory levels against a reorder threshold per SKU and flags anything that needs restocking before it actually sells out. Use this if a bestseller has ever gone out of stock because nobody was watching the count.

jobs.name: Loyalty Enrollment & Redemption Rate Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks new loyalty program enrollments and reward redemptions against targets, not just whether individual points are about to expire. Use this if enrollment has ever quietly stalled, or redemption has ever dropped off a cliff, for months before anyone looked at the trend.

jobs.name: Loyalty Points Expiry Reminder
jobs.description: Finds customers whose loyalty/reward points are about to expire unused. Use this if points have ever quietly expired on customers who would have redeemed them if someone had just reminded them in time.

jobs.name: Loyalty Program Points Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Compares points earned per stay against your program's accrual rate and flags stays where the posted points don't match, plus any member who crossed a tier threshold but hasn't been re-tiered yet. Use this if a loyalty member has ever been shorted points from a PMS integration glitch, or hit Gold status and kept getting Silver-level perks for months.

jobs.name: Macro/Canned Response Staleness Check
jobs.description: Flags saved canned responses (macros) that haven't been used in a long time so someone can check whether they're still accurate. Use this if a stale macro has ever gone out with outdated pricing, a dead link, or a policy that changed months ago.

jobs.name: Maintenance Contract Renewal Check
jobs.description: Checks recurring service/maintenance contracts (annual HVAC tune-ups, quarterly plumbing inspections) against their renewal date and flags any coming up so the customer can be rebooked before the contract lapses. Use this if a maintenance customer has ever silently churned because nobody called to renew before the term ran out.

jobs.name: Maintenance Request SLA Check
jobs.description: Scans open tenant maintenance requests and flags any that have blown past your response or resolution SLA. Use this if a leaky faucet or broken heater has ever sat unaddressed for weeks because the request got logged and then forgotten.

jobs.name: Manufacturer Recall Notice Check
jobs.description: Cross-references newly issued manufacturer recall notices against vehicles in service history and current inventory, flagging any match that hasn't been contacted or scheduled yet. Use this if a customer has ever found out about a safety recall on their own before the shop that services their car did.

jobs.name: Manuscript Deadline Tracker
jobs.description: Flags manuscript milestones (first draft, revisions, final delivery) coming due from authors or editors. Use this if a book has ever slipped its production schedule because a manuscript deadline only lived in an email thread nobody rechecked.

jobs.name: Markdown Aging Inventory Check
jobs.description: Flags SKUs that have sat unsold past a set number of days so they can be marked down before they become dead stock. Use this if slow-moving inventory has ever tied up cash for months because nobody was tracking how long items had actually been sitting on the shelf.

jobs.name: Markdown Execution Audit Check
jobs.description: Confirms that approved markdowns were actually applied at the register, not just flagged as candidates. Use this if a markdown has ever been approved on paper but never keyed into the POS, so the item kept ringing at full price for weeks while it sat on the clearance rack.

jobs.name: Marketplace Listing Sync Drift Check
jobs.description: Compares price and stock on your source-of-truth catalog against what's actually live on a marketplace (Amazon, eBay, Etsy) and flags any SKU that's drifted out of sync. Use this if a marketplace listing has ever shown a stale price or "in stock" on an item you'd already sold out of on your own store, because the sync job silently failed.

jobs.name: Material Delivery Delay Check
jobs.description: Checks ordered construction materials against their expected delivery date and flags anything overdue from the supplier. Use this if a crew has ever stood idle on site because a material delivery was quietly late and nobody chased it up.

jobs.name: Weekly Meal Plan Reminder
jobs.description: Nudges you to plan the week's meals, and can draft a simple 7-day plan plus grocery list for you. Use this if you dread the "what's for dinner" question every night and want to decide once a week instead.

jobs.name: Medical Equipment Calibration Check
jobs.description: Checks a tracked list of medical equipment (blood pressure cuffs, glucometers, defibrillators, scales) against calibration due dates and warns before any lapse. Use this if a piece of equipment has ever been found overdue for calibration only when an inspector or auditor flagged it.

jobs.name: Medication Inventory Expiry Check
jobs.description: Scans the clinic's drug and vaccine inventory log for items expiring soon so they can be used, returned, or discarded before they go bad. Use this if expired medication has ever turned up still on the shelf during an audit.

jobs.name: Medication Refill Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to refill a medication before you run out, based on how many days of supply you have left. Use this if you've ever run out of a prescription over a weekend when the pharmacy's closed.

jobs.name: Membership/Package Unused-Session Expiry Check
jobs.description: Flags members or package holders whose prepaid sessions or membership credits are about to expire unused. Use this if a client has ever paid for a monthly facial membership, banked three unused visits, and let them evaporate because nobody reminded them to book.

jobs.name: Menu Item 86 Frequency Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews how often each menu item gets 86'd (marked sold out) mid- service and flags items that run out repeatedly, which usually points to a par-level or ordering problem rather than one bad night. Use this if the same dish has ever been 86'd three Fridays in a row before anyone connected the dots.

jobs.name: Menu Item Profitability Check
jobs.description: Compares each menu item's plate cost against its menu price and flags items whose contribution margin has dropped below target. Use this if an ingredient cost has ever crept up on a specific dish until it was quietly losing money on every order, unlike the overall food-cost percentage which only shows the average.

jobs.name: Material Handling Equipment Preventive Maintenance Check
jobs.description: Checks scheduled preventive maintenance due dates for material handling equipment other than forklifts — pallet jacks, order pickers, conveyor drive units — and flags anything overdue. Use this if a piece of MHE has ever broken down mid-shift for a service item that was actually due weeks earlier and nobody was tracking anything but the forklifts.

jobs.name: Minibar Charge Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Compares housekeeping's logged minibar restocks against folio charges posted for the same room and flags mismatches. Use this if a restocked minibar has ever gone uncharged, or a guest was charged for an item housekeeping never actually replaced.

jobs.name: Month-End Close Checklist Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks a list of month-end financial close tasks (reconcile bank, post accruals, review AR/AP, close subledgers, etc.) and flags incomplete items as the close deadline approaches. Use this if your monthly close has ever slipped a step because nobody had a single place tracking whether every task actually got done.

jobs.name: Morning Briefing Digest
jobs.description: Pulls together overnight email, today's calendar, and any connected analytics/monitoring dashboards into one short digest waiting for you at the start of the day. Use this if you start your morning tab-hopping across five dashboards before you've even had coffee.

jobs.name: Move-In/Move-Out Inspection Checklist Tracker
jobs.description: Flags move-ins and move-outs where the condition inspection checklist hasn't been completed within a set number of days of the move date. Use this if a deposit dispute has ever fallen apart because there was no signed move-in or move-out condition report to point to.

jobs.name: Multi-Account Cash Position Rollup
jobs.description: Sums balances across multiple bank/cash accounts into one total position and flags if the total or any single account drops below a minimum threshold. Use this if cash is spread across several accounts or entities and you want a single low-balance tripwire instead of checking each account separately.

jobs.name: Multi-Year Renewal Escalation Tracker
jobs.description: Flags multi-year contracts approaching their next contract-year anniversary, where a pre-agreed price escalation kicks in, so the customer gets notice before the higher invoice arrives. Use this if a customer has ever been surprised by a built-in price increase on a multi-year deal because nobody sent the required notice ahead of the anniversary date.

jobs.name: NDA Expiry Check
jobs.description: Warns you before a signed NDA reaches its expiration or renewal date. Use this if an NDA has ever lapsed mid-relationship and nobody noticed the confidentiality coverage had run out.

jobs.name: Negative Review Alert
jobs.description: Checks for new low-star product reviews and flags them same-day instead of letting them sit in a dashboard nobody checks. Use this if a bad review has ever sat live for a week before anyone on the team noticed and responded.

jobs.name: Net Worth Snapshot Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to log your net worth each month and shows the trend from your last two entries. Use this if you want to track your finances over time but keep forgetting to actually sit down and do it.

jobs.name: New Hire Onboarding Task Check
jobs.description: Checks which new hires have onboarding tasks (accounts, equipment, paperwork) that are still open past their target date. Use this if a new hire has ever shown up without laptop access or benefits paperwork because a checklist item silently slipped through the cracks.

jobs.name: New Hire Paperwork Completion Check
jobs.description: Checks which recently started employees still have incomplete onboarding paperwork (I-9, tax forms, benefits enrollment, signed handbook) and flags them before they become a compliance problem. Use this if onboarding paperwork has ever slipped through the cracks past the legal deadline.

jobs.name: New Restaurant Roundup
jobs.description: Checks for restaurants that newly opened near you in the last week and gives you a short list to consider. Use this if you like trying new places but never remember to actually go looking for what just opened.

jobs.name: Newly Funded Companies Lead Scout
jobs.description: Checks funding-announcement sources for companies that just raised in your target market and drafts a first-outreach message for each. Use this if you sell to companies that spend differently right after a funding round and you want to reach them before every other vendor does.

jobs.name: Newsletter Unsubscribe Spike Check
jobs.description: Checks your most recent newsletter send's unsubscribe rate against a threshold and flags it if it's abnormally high. Use this if a bad subject line or list segment has ever quietly torched your audience before anyone compared it to prior sends.

jobs.name: NFT Floor Price Watch
jobs.description: Checks an NFT collection's floor price via a public marketplace API and alerts if it drops below a threshold. Use this if you've ever wanted a heads-up when a collection you hold or track dips below a price level you care about, without staring at a marketplace tab all day.

jobs.name: Non-Compete / Non-Solicit Expiry Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks the restricted-period end date of non-compete and non-solicit agreements for departed employees and warns as each one is about to expire. Use this if you've ever needed to know exactly when a former employee's restrictive covenant runs out — before deciding whether to act on a suspected violation, or before it's too late to.

jobs.name: Non-Conformance Report Backlog Check
jobs.description: Counts open non-conformance reports (NCRs) that have gone past their disposition deadline without a root cause or corrective action logged. Use this if an NCR has ever sat open for months with the nonconforming material still floating around because nobody was tracking the disposition clock.

jobs.name: Occupancy Forecast Variance Check
jobs.description: Compares this week's forecasted occupancy against actual rooms sold and flags a meaningful gap in either direction. Use this if a forecast has ever been quietly wrong for weeks, leaving staffing either overbooked on labor during a slow stretch or short-staffed during a rush nobody planned for.

jobs.name: OEE Efficiency Check
jobs.description: Calculates Overall Equipment Effectiveness (availability x performance x quality) for a line from a production log and flags it when it drops below target. Use this if a line has ever "felt slow" for weeks before anyone put a single number on how much effectiveness it was actually losing.

jobs.name: Offer Expiry Reminder
jobs.description: Flags extended offers that are close to their response deadline with no answer yet. Use this if an offer has ever quietly expired because nobody followed up before the deadline passed.

jobs.name: On-Call Fatigue Check
jobs.description: Checks the on-call rotation history and flags if the same person has been covering on-call more often than the rotation intends. Use this if someone has ever quietly ended up on-call three weeks running because swaps kept landing on the same person and nobody was tracking the pattern.

jobs.name: Onboarding Completion Stall Check
jobs.description: Checks new users against your onboarding checklist and flags anyone who's been stuck on the same step for too long. Use this if new users have ever quietly abandoned setup partway through and nobody reached out until they'd already churned.

jobs.name: On-call Handoff Reminder
jobs.description: Nudges outgoing and incoming on-call to sync before the shift changes. Use this if a handoff has ever happened silently and the new on-call found out about an open incident from a page instead of a briefing.

jobs.name: Expected Open Ports Check
jobs.description: Checks that the ports you expect to be open on a host actually are, and flags any that aren't. Use this if a service has ever silently stopped listening and you found out from a user instead of a monitor.

jobs.name: Open Req Aging Check
jobs.description: Flags job requisitions that have been open too long without enough candidates in the pipeline. Use this if a req has ever sat open for months before anyone asked why it wasn't moving.

jobs.name: Order Fulfillment On-Time-Ship SLA Watch
jobs.description: Checks yesterday's order log for orders that missed their promised ship-by date/time and flags the on-time-ship rate against target. Use this if an on-time-ship rate has ever slipped for a week before anyone outside the warehouse noticed, because nobody was tallying misses against the SLA daily.

jobs.name: Org Chart Manager Drift Check
jobs.description: Compares the manager field in the HRIS against a separately maintained org-chart source of truth and flags mismatches. Use this if the "reports to" field has ever gone stale after a reorg, leaving reviews, approvals, or reminders routed to someone's old manager for months.

jobs.name: Orphaned Branch Cleanup
jobs.description: Lists remote branches already merged into main that nobody's deleted yet. Use this if your branch list has become a graveyard nobody wants to clean up.

jobs.name: OSHA Recordable Incident Log Audit
jobs.description: Checks the incident log for recordable injuries that haven't been logged on the OSHA 300 form within the required window. Use this if a recordable incident has ever slipped past the logging deadline because the person who handled the report forgot to also update the 300 log.

jobs.name: OTA Rate Parity Check
jobs.description: Compares your listed room rates across OTAs (Booking.com, Expedia, etc.) against your direct-booking rate and flags any channel undercutting you. Use this if an OTA has ever quietly shown a lower rate than your own website, driving bookings away from your cheapest channel.

jobs.name: Outside Counsel Invoice Budget Check
jobs.description: Compares outside counsel invoices billed to date against each matter's approved budget and flags matters approaching or over budget. Use this if a matter budget has ever been blown through silently because invoices got approved one at a time without anyone tracking the running total against the budget set at intake.

jobs.name: Overbooking Risk Alert
jobs.description: Compares confirmed reservations for each upcoming night against total available rooms and flags nights where bookings exceed inventory. Use this if an intentional overbooking cushion has ever tipped into an actual walked guest because nobody was watching the running total as last-minute bookings came in.

jobs.name: Overdue Library Materials Check
jobs.description: Scans checked-out library items and flags anything past its due date by more than a grace period. Use this if overdue textbooks or library books have ever piled up unnoticed until inventory time.

jobs.name: Overstock / Slow-Mover Check
jobs.description: Flags SKUs sitting well above normal stock levels with low recent sales velocity, tying up capital and warehouse space. Use this if slow-moving stock has ever piled up quietly until a year-end count revealed how much cash was sitting on shelves doing nothing.

jobs.name: Page Speed Regression Watch
jobs.description: Checks a page's load time against a baseline and flags a real regression. Use this if a page has ever gotten slowly, silently slower release after release until it was a real problem.

jobs.name: Pallet Putaway Delay Check
jobs.description: Checks how long received pallets have been sitting in the receiving area before getting put away, and flags anything stuck too long. Use this if inventory has ever gone "missing" only to turn up still shrink-wrapped on a receiving pallet from three days ago.

jobs.name: Parent-Teacher Conference No-Show Tracker
jobs.description: Checks scheduled parent-teacher conferences against attendance and flags no-shows for follow-up. Use this if a family has ever missed a conference slot and nobody rescheduled it, especially for a student where that conversation actually mattered.

jobs.name: Parts Backorder Check
jobs.description: Checks ordered parts against their expected arrival date and flags anything overdue from the supplier. Use this if a repair has ever stalled for a week because a part was quietly backordered and nobody followed up with the supplier until a customer asked why their car wasn't ready.

jobs.name: Parts Low-Stock Reorder Check
jobs.description: Checks your truck/warehouse parts inventory against reorder thresholds and flags anything running low before a tech shows up on a job without the capacitor or valve they need. Use this if a job has ever been rescheduled because a common part was quietly out of stock.

jobs.name: Parts Department Reorder Point Check
jobs.description: Checks parts counter stock-on-hand against each SKU's reorder point and flags anything that's dropped below it, so a routine oil filter or brake pad isn't out of stock when a tech needs it mid-repair. Use this if a common part has ever run out because nobody was watching the shelf until it was already empty.

jobs.name: Passport Expiry Check
jobs.description: Warns you before your passport expires — including the "6 months validity required" rule many countries enforce at the border. Use this if you've ever booked a trip and only checked your passport date after buying the ticket.

jobs.name: Patent Maintenance Fee Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a patent maintenance (annuity) fee comes due so the patent doesn't lapse. Use this if a patent has ever gone abandoned because a maintenance fee deadline was missed.

jobs.name: Overdue Patient Balance Aging Check
jobs.description: Buckets outstanding self-pay patient balances by how long they've been unpaid (30/60/90+ days) and flags the oldest ones for collections follow-up. Use this if patient balances have ever quietly aged past the point of easy recovery because nobody was reviewing accounts receivable by age, only by total dollar amount.

jobs.name: Patient Immunization Schedule Check
jobs.description: Checks which patients are due or overdue for a scheduled immunization and lists them for outreach. Use this if a patient (child or adult) has ever fallen behind on a vaccine series because nobody was tracking due dates against the immunization schedule between visits — this is for human patients, distinct from jobs/veterinary/pet-vaccine-due-reminder.yaml which tracks pet vaccines at an animal clinic.

jobs.name: Patient Portal Message Backlog Check
jobs.description: Checks unanswered patient portal messages against a response-time SLA and flags anything overdue. Use this if a patient message has ever sat unanswered in the portal inbox for days because it scrolled off the top of a busy staff member's queue and nobody was tracking age.

jobs.name: Patient Recall Reminder
jobs.description: Finds patients due (or overdue) for a routine checkup, cleaning, or screening and lists them for outreach. Use this if recall/recare lists pile up and patients quietly fall off the schedule for a year or more.

jobs.name: Patient Satisfaction Survey Response Tracking
jobs.description: Tallies patient satisfaction survey response rates and surfaces low scores with comments for follow-up. Use this if low-scoring survey responses have ever sat unread in an inbox, or a slipping response rate went unnoticed for months — distinct from generic online reviews, this tracks a practice's own post-visit survey instrument.

jobs.name: Pay Equity Band Outlier Check
jobs.description: Scans a salary-band export for employees paid outside their role's band or unusually far from the band midpoint, and summarizes any patterns worth a closer look. Use this if pay outliers have ever gone unnoticed for a review cycle simply because nobody cross-checked salaries against bands until an audit or a pay-equity complaint forced the issue.

jobs.name: Payroll Run Cutoff Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you before the payroll submission cutoff so timesheets and changes get in on time. Use this if payroll has ever run late because a timesheet or new-hire update missed the cutoff by a day.

jobs.name: Payroll Run Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before the payroll submission deadline so employees actually get paid on time. Use this if payroll has ever run late because the submission cutoff snuck up during a busy week.

jobs.name: Peering/Transit Contract Renewal Check
jobs.description: Checks upstream transit and peering agreements for upcoming renewal or auto-renew deadlines and warns with enough lead time to renegotiate. Use this if a transit contract has ever auto-renewed at last year's rate (or worse) because nobody flagged the deadline until the invoice changed.

jobs.name: Performance Review Cycle Reminder
jobs.description: Tracks the performance review cycle deadline and flags managers who haven't submitted reviews yet as the deadline approaches. Use this if a review cycle has ever closed with a chunk of reviews still missing because nobody chased the stragglers until HR asked.

jobs.name: Permissions Clearance Tracker
jobs.description: Flags quoted material, images, lyrics, or other third-party content in a forthcoming title that still needs permissions clearance before the book goes to press. Use this if a title has ever gone to print with an uncleared quote or image because clearance status wasn't tracked centrally.

jobs.name: Permit Application Approval Backlog Check
jobs.description: Flags submitted permit applications that are still awaiting municipal approval past a reasonable turnaround window. Use this if a project has ever sat idle at the "waiting on the city" stage far longer than expected because nobody was tracking submission-to-approval time.

jobs.name: Permit Application Backlog Check
jobs.description: Checks how many permit applications are sitting in review past your target processing time, from the issuing agency's side. Use this if applications have ever piled up in a queue for weeks with no one tracking total backlog size or average age.

jobs.name: Building Permit Expiry Check
jobs.description: Warns you before a building permit expires so work doesn't get caught without valid coverage. Use this if a permit has ever lapsed mid-project and forced a costly re-inspection or re-application.

jobs.name: Pet Vaccine Due Reminder
jobs.description: Checks which patients are due or overdue for a vaccine and lists them for outreach. Use this if a pet has ever gone a year past due for a core vaccine because the reminder postcard got lost in the mail.

jobs.name: Petty Cash Float Reconciliation
jobs.description: Checks that a petty cash log's starting float minus logged expenses plus replenishments matches the expected remaining balance, and flags any variance. Use this if a physical cash box or float has ever come up short (or over) and nobody could explain why.

jobs.name: Pick/Pack Error Rate Watch
jobs.description: Checks recent order fulfillment error rate (wrong item, wrong quantity, missing item) against a target and flags it when it climbs. Use this if a fulfillment error rate has ever crept up for weeks before a spike in return/complaint volume made the problem impossible to ignore.

jobs.name: Pipeline Hygiene Audit
jobs.description: Finds open deals missing basic required fields, like an amount, a close date, or a next step, so forecasts and reports aren't quietly built on bad data. Use this if a forecast has ever been wrong because half the pipeline had blank fields nobody was checking for.

jobs.name: Planogram Compliance Audit Check
jobs.description: Reviews a store's shelf/floor photos against the current planogram and flags sections that are out of compliance. Use this if a reset has ever quietly drifted out of plan for weeks — wrong facings, missing end-caps, product in the wrong bay — before a district visit caught it.

jobs.name: Plant Watering Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to water a specific plant once it's due. Use this if you've ever lost a plant to "I'll water it tomorrow."

jobs.name: Esports Player Contract Renewal Check
jobs.description: Warns you before a roster player's or staff member's contract expires. Use this if a player has ever gone unsigned mid-season because a contract end date slipped past without anyone flagging it in time to negotiate a renewal.

jobs.name: Sales-Led POC Conversion Tracker
jobs.description: Flags sales-assisted proof-of-concept (POC) engagements approaching or past their end date with no closed-won or closed-lost outcome recorded. Use this if an enterprise POC has ever quietly run past its agreed end date with no clear owner pushing toward a decision.

jobs.name: Podcast Download Drop Watch
jobs.description: Compares a new episode's early download numbers against your recent average and flags a real drop. Use this if a listenership decline has ever gone unnoticed for months because nobody compared episode numbers side by side.

jobs.name: Podcast Rating/Review Watch
jobs.description: Checks for new ratings and reviews on your podcast platforms and flags a negative one or a rating drop worth looking into. Use this if a critical review has ever sat unanswered for months because nobody checks the ratings page between episodes.

jobs.name: Policy Cancellation & Lapse Rate Monitor
jobs.description: Calculates the weekly policy cancellation/lapse rate and flags it when it climbs past a healthy baseline, so retention teams can react before a leaky book turns into a shrinking one. Use this if a rising lapse rate has ever gone unnoticed until a quarterly report showed the book had quietly shrunk.

jobs.name: Policy Renewal Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before an insurance policy's renewal date so you have time to shop around or review coverage, instead of auto-renewing on autopilot. Use this if you've ever realized a policy renewed months ago at a higher rate without you noticing.

jobs.name: Port Congestion Watch
jobs.description: Checks a port's average vessel wait time and flags it once congestion crosses your threshold. Use this if a congested port has ever blown up a shipping timeline before anyone checked the wait times.

jobs.name: Portfolio Rebalance Check
jobs.description: Compares your current asset allocation to your target and flags drift worth rebalancing. Use this if your portfolio only gets rebalanced whenever you happen to remember to look.

jobs.name: POS End-of-Day Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Compares the POS system's expected cash-drawer total against what was actually counted at close and flags any shift over the acceptable variance. Use this if a drawer has ever come up short (or suspiciously over) and nobody traced it back to which shift it happened on.

jobs.name: POS Till Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Checks each register's end-of-day cash count against expected POS totals and flags any discrepancy. Use this if a till has ever come up short for days running before anyone connected the pattern to a specific shift or register.

jobs.name: POS Void & Refund Anomaly Tracker
jobs.description: Flags cashiers or registers with an unusually high rate of transaction voids and refunds instead of treating each one as an isolated event. Use this if register-level fraud or sweethearting has ever gone unnoticed for months because void/refund activity was never rolled up per employee.

jobs.name: Post-Event Survey Response Rate Watch
jobs.description: Compares how many attendees were sent a post-event survey against how many actually responded, and flags events with a weak response rate. Use this if you've ever sent a feedback survey after an event and had no idea whether the response rate was normal or a sign nobody cared to reply.

jobs.name: Skill Practice Streak Check
jobs.description: Checks a practice log file for a skill you're building (language, instrument, coding kata) and warns if too many days have passed since the last logged session. Use this if a daily practice habit has ever quietly lapsed without you noticing until weeks had gone by.

jobs.name: Premium Payment Delinquency Tracker
jobs.description: Scans the book of business for policyholders past due on premium payments and flags accounts approaching cancellation-for-nonpayment, so collections or retention outreach can happen before a policy lapses. Use this if delinquent accounts have ever piled up unnoticed until a batch of policies cancelled all at once.

jobs.name: Insurance Premium Payment Due Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before an insurance premium payment is due, separate from the policy's renewal date. Use this if a policy has ever lapsed for non-payment even though the renewal itself was months away, because a monthly or quarterly premium payment was missed.

jobs.name: Prescription Refill Request Backlog Check
jobs.description: Checks pending prescription refill requests against how long they've been waiting and flags anything past a reasonable turnaround. Use this if a refill request has ever sat in a queue long enough that a patient ran out of a maintenance medication before the practice got to it.

jobs.name: Preventive Maintenance Due Check
jobs.description: Flags equipment coming due for scheduled preventive maintenance. Use this if a machine has ever failed unexpectedly that would've been caught by a PM visit nobody scheduled in time.

jobs.name: Price Tag Audit Accuracy Check
jobs.description: Reviews photos of shelf price tags against the current POS price file and flags mismatches. Use this if a customer has ever caught a scan-versus-tag price discrepancy at the register before the store did — those add up fast in refunds, complaints, and occasional fines.

jobs.name: Print Run Reorder Threshold Check
jobs.description: Flags titles whose warehouse stock has dropped below the reorder threshold, so a reprint can be queued before the book goes out of stock. Use this if a title has ever gone unavailable for weeks because nobody noticed the print run was running low until it was already sold out.

jobs.name: Prior Authorization Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks treatment-specific prior-authorization requests for approvals about to expire before the procedure happens, and for requests still stuck awaiting payer response. Use this if a procedure has ever been delayed or denied because the prior auth expired, or the payer never responded and nobody was tracking it — distinct from insurance-eligibility-verification-check, which covers general visit eligibility rather than a specific treatment's authorization.

jobs.name: Probation Period Review Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a new hire's probation period ends so a manager can complete the required review before it lapses automatically. Use this if a probation deadline has ever passed with no review on file and nobody caught it until it became a compliance headache.

jobs.name: Product & Chemical Expiry Check
jobs.description: Flags skincare products, dye lots, wax, and other chemical inventory approaching their expiration or period-after-opening date. Use this if an esthetician or colorist has ever applied a product past its safe-use date because the expiry label was never checked against today's date.

jobs.name: Product Feed Health Check
jobs.description: Scans your product catalog export for listings that are live but broken in some way — missing title, missing description, missing image, a zero/blank price, or marked out-of-stock while still visible to shoppers. Use this if a product has ever sat on your storefront for weeks with a broken image or a $0 price because nobody was checking feed quality after the initial upload.

jobs.name: Production Line Downtime Watch
jobs.description: Checks how long a production line has been stopped and flags it once it crosses a threshold. Use this if a line has ever sat down far longer than anyone realized because the stoppage alert never made it to the right person.

jobs.name: Production Schedule Adherence Check
jobs.description: Compares actual output against the planned production schedule and explains any meaningful variance. Use this if a schedule slip has ever gone unexplained until it was too late to recover the shift, because nobody compared plan vs. actual until the week was already over.

jobs.name: Project Budget vs. Actual Cost Variance Check
jobs.description: Compares actual spend against budget by cost code for each active project and flags codes running over threshold. Use this if a project has ever "felt fine" right up until closeout, when the actual cost report showed a cost code had been bleeding over budget for months unnoticed.

jobs.name: Proof-of-Delivery Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Checks shipments marked delivered against whether a signed proof-of- delivery has actually been received and filed. Use this if a delivery dispute has ever dragged on for weeks because nobody could produce the POD to settle it.

jobs.name: Property Maintenance Inspection Reminder
jobs.description: Tracks when each property was last inspected and flags any that are due for their next routine walkthrough. Use this if a property has ever gone a year or more without a proper inspection because nothing forced anyone to schedule one.

jobs.name: Property Tax Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a property tax payment is due for a tracked property. Use this if a property tax bill has ever gone unpaid past the deadline because it arrived by mail and got buried, resulting in penalties or a lien risk.

jobs.name: Proposal Follow-Up Nudge
jobs.description: Checks which sent proposals/quotes have had no reply after a set number of days and drafts a short follow-up nudge for each. Use this if a proposal has ever gone quiet after you sent it, and only much later did you realize nobody had followed up.

jobs.name: PTO Balance Check
jobs.description: Warns you before unused PTO expires or resets. Use this if you've ever lost vacation days because you forgot they don't roll over.

jobs.name: Company-Wide PTO Use-It-or-Lose-It Check
jobs.description: Scans the full employee roster for anyone whose unused PTO balance is above the policy cap or won't be usable before the year-end reset, so HR/payroll can send a bulk nudge. Use this if payout or forfeiture disputes have ever come up in December because nobody flagged high balances company-wide until it was too late to schedule time off. This is the HR-wide roster check — for tracking just your own balance, use team/pto-balance-check instead.

jobs.name: Public Comment Period Closing Check
jobs.description: Checks open public comment periods for pending rules or proposals against their close date and flags the ones closing soon. Use this if a comment period has ever expired with barely any public input logged because nobody was tracking the closing date.

jobs.name: Public Meeting Notice Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks that an upcoming public meeting's notice was posted with enough lead time to meet open-meetings law requirements. Use this if a meeting has ever gotten challenged, or had to be redone, because notice went out a day late.

jobs.name: Public Records Retention Purge Check
jobs.description: Checks records against their retention schedule and flags anything past its retention period as eligible for archival review or purge. Use this if a records room has ever quietly kept documents years past their legally required retention window simply because nobody was tracking expiry dates.

jobs.name: Punch List Completion Tracker
jobs.description: Tracks open punch list items against the project's target closeout date and flags projects falling behind on completion rate. Use this if a closeout has ever dragged on for months because punch items trickled in one at a time with nobody watching the overall burn-down.

jobs.name: Purchase Order Overdue Check
jobs.description: Checks open purchase orders to suppliers against their expected delivery date and flags anything that hasn't arrived on time. Use this if a supplier has ever gone quiet on a PO and you only found out stock wasn't coming when you were already out of the item.

jobs.name: Purchase Order Receiving Delay Check
jobs.description: Checks open purchase orders against their expected delivery date and flags any that are overdue and not yet marked received. Use this if stock has ever run out because a purchase order was quietly late and nobody chased the supplier until shelves were already empty.

jobs.name: Quality Defect Rate Check
jobs.description: Checks today's defect rate against a target and flags it if it's running high. Use this if a quality problem has ever run for a full shift before anyone pulled the numbers and noticed.

jobs.name: Quarterly Estimated Tax Calculator
jobs.description: Calculates a suggested quarterly estimated tax payment from your logged year-to-date income and a target tax rate, and warns as the next IRS-style quarterly due date approaches. Use this if you're self-employed or have untaxed income and want the actual dollar amount worked out, not just a bare date reminder (see tax-deadline-reminder for a generic multi-jurisdiction deadline list).

jobs.name: Queue Depth Check
jobs.description: Checks how backed up a job queue is and warns if it crosses a threshold. Use this if a stuck worker has ever let a queue silently balloon until someone noticed customers weren't getting emails.

jobs.name: Quota Attainment Check
jobs.description: Compares a rep's closed-won revenue this period against their quota pace and flags whether they're on track. Use this if a rep has ever found out they missed quota only at the end of the quarter, instead of with enough runway left to fix it.

jobs.name: Sales Quote Expiry Reminder
jobs.description: Flags outstanding price quotes that are about to expire before the customer has accepted them. Use this if a quote has ever lapsed and forced a re-negotiation because nobody followed up before the locked-in pricing ran out.

jobs.name: Quote-to-Bind Conversion Rate Tracker
jobs.description: Calculates the quote-to-bind conversion rate over the trailing period and flags it when it drops below target, so sales/underwriting leaders catch a pricing or process problem while it's still small. Use this if a falling close rate has ever gone unnoticed for a full quarter because nobody was watching quotes lost, only policies written.

jobs.name: Raw Material Shortage Risk Check
jobs.description: Compares raw material stock against what the production schedule needs over the next planning window, and flags anything that'll run short. Use this if a production run has ever stalled mid-shift because a component ran out and nobody had cross-checked stock against the schedule beforehand.

jobs.name: Reading List Nudge
jobs.description: Reminds you what's next on your reading list. Use this if you save articles/books to "read later" and later never comes.

jobs.name: Recurring Payment Failure Check
jobs.description: Flags subscription charges that failed and haven't successfully retried yet. Use this if a failed card has ever silently churned a customer because nobody noticed the retry never succeeded.

jobs.name: Recurring Task Queue Reset
jobs.description: Clears out last week's completed recurring-task checklist and creates a fresh one from your template, so every cycle starts with the same predefined owners and checklist instead of a copy-pasted mess. Use this if your recurring weekly checklist has ever quietly drifted because someone edited last week's copy instead of starting clean.

jobs.name: Reference Check Overdue Reminder
jobs.description: Checks candidates whose reference checks were requested but never came back within a set window and flags them so recruiters can chase them down. Use this if an offer has ever stalled because a reference check quietly sat unanswered for weeks.

jobs.name: Referral Follow-Up Tracker
jobs.description: Flags customer referrals that were asked for or given, and haven't had a logged follow-up after a set number of days. Use this if a happy customer has ever offered a referral introduction and it fell through the cracks because nobody owned the follow-up.

jobs.name: Pending Referral Follow-up Check
jobs.description: Checks outbound specialist referrals that haven't been scheduled or completed within a set window and flags them for follow-up. Use this if a patient has ever fallen through the cracks after being referred out, with nobody confirming they actually got the appointment.

jobs.name: Reinsurance Treaty Renewal Tracker
jobs.description: Warns before a reinsurance treaty's renewal or non-renewal notice date so terms can be renegotiated or the market re-shopped in time. Use this if a treaty has ever auto-renewed on unfavorable terms because the notice window quietly passed.

jobs.name: Rent Increase Notice Deadline Check
jobs.description: Checks upcoming lease anniversaries against the legally required notice period for a rent increase, and drafts the increase notice once one is due. Use this if you've ever missed the window to raise rent at renewal because the required notice lead time (30/60/90 days, depending on jurisdiction) quietly passed.

jobs.name: Rent Payment Late Check
jobs.description: Flags tenants whose rent is overdue past the grace period. Use this if a late payment has ever gone unnoticed for weeks because nobody was cross-checking the rent roll against the bank deposits.

jobs.name: Rent Roll Vacancy Loss Report
jobs.description: Rolls up the whole portfolio's rent ledger to calculate total dollar vacancy loss (market rent for every vacant unit, summed) for the period. Use this if you've ever known "a few units are empty" without knowing what that's actually costing you in dollars this month.

jobs.name: Rental License / Registration Renewal Check
jobs.description: Warns before a municipal rental license, landlord registration, or certificate of occupancy for rental use is due to expire. Use this if a city has ever fined you, or blocked a new lease, because a rental registration lapsed and nobody was tracking its renewal cycle.

jobs.name: Rental Vacancy Check
jobs.description: Flags a rental listing that's been vacant longer than expected. Use this if a unit has ever sat empty for months while everyone assumed someone else was handling the listing.

jobs.name: Repair Order Cycle Time Trend Monitor
jobs.description: Reviews closed repair orders from the past week and compares the average check-in-to-checkout cycle time against your rolling baseline, flagging a trend drift even when no single order looks late. Use this if turnaround has ever quietly crept up week over week without any one repair order tripping an aging alert.

jobs.name: Repair Order Aging Check
jobs.description: Checks open repair orders and flags any vehicle that's been sitting in the shop past your target turnaround with no status update. Use this if a car has ever sat on a lift for days with no visible progress because it fell out of the technician's mental queue.

jobs.name: Git Repo Health Check
jobs.description: Checks a git repo for branches nobody's touched in a while, uncommitted changes sitting around, and pull requests waiting on review, then reports a short digest. Use this if you want a daily nudge on repo hygiene without checking everything by hand.

jobs.name: Report Card Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before the grade submission deadline for report cards. Use this if grades have ever gone in late because the cutoff snuck up during the last busy week of the term.

jobs.name: Reservation No-show Check
jobs.description: Checks yesterday's no-show rate against your normal baseline and flags a spike. Use this if a run of no-shows has ever quietly hurt revenue for days before anyone connected the pattern.

jobs.name: Reservation No-Show Pattern Check
jobs.description: Reviews recent reservation no-shows and flags parties/times where no-shows cluster, so you know whether a deposit or confirmation-call policy would help. Use this if a certain night or party size keeps costing you empty tables.

jobs.name: Retail Product Low-Stock Check
jobs.description: Scans your retail/backbar inventory log and flags skincare, haircare, or nail products at or below reorder point. Use this if a stylist or esthetician has ever reached for a product mid-service and found the shelf empty because nobody was watching the count.

jobs.name: Retainage / Holdback Release Tracker
jobs.description: Flags subcontractor retainage (holdback) that's eligible for release based on project completion percentage or elapsed lien period, so it doesn't sit uncollected for months after it was earned. Use this if a sub has ever had to chase a general contractor for retainage that was technically releasable but nobody flagged it.

jobs.name: Retirement Plan Enrollment Deadline Check
jobs.description: Flags employees who are eligible for the 401(k)/retirement plan but haven't enrolled or waived as their enrollment deadline approaches. Use this if someone has ever missed the window to make an active election and got dropped into a default auto-enrollment deferral rate they didn't actually want.

jobs.name: Return Fraud Pattern Check
jobs.description: Checks recent returns for patterns that look like abuse — the same customer returning unusually often, or a spike in receiptless returns — instead of treating every return as an isolated, no-questions-asked event. Use this if return fraud has ever quietly eaten margin for months because nobody was looking at returns in aggregate.

jobs.name: Return/Refund Backlog Check
jobs.description: Checks how many return/refund requests are sitting unprocessed and flags any past your stated turnaround time. Use this if refund complaints have ever shown up in reviews before anyone internally noticed the backlog.

jobs.name: Returns Processing Backlog Check
jobs.description: Scans the returns log for items that have sat unprocessed longer than your target turnaround time. Use this if returned inventory has ever piled up because nobody was tracking how long items had been waiting to be inspected and restocked or disposed of.

jobs.name: Review Request Nudge
jobs.description: Flags customers who bought a while ago and haven't been asked for a review yet. Use this if review requests only happen when someone remembers to send them.

jobs.name: RFI Response Time Tracker
jobs.description: Flags open Requests for Information (RFIs) that have gone unanswered longer than the agreed response window. Use this if a crew has ever stalled on a detail because an RFI sent to the architect or engineer sat unanswered for weeks with nobody chasing it.

jobs.name: Rights and License Expiry Check
jobs.description: Warns you before a granted or acquired rights/licensing deal (foreign rights, film/TV options, audio, translation) expires or comes up for renewal. Use this if a rights deal has ever lapsed silently because the expiry date only lived in the signed contract's PDF.

jobs.name: Robots.txt Blanket-Block Check
jobs.description: Checks that your robots.txt hasn't accidentally blocked every crawler from your entire site. Use this if a robots.txt edit has ever accidentally tanked your search traffic.

jobs.name: Preventive Maintenance Work Order Tracker
jobs.description: Checks scheduled preventive maintenance work orders (HVAC service, fire safety checks, deep cleans) against their due dates and flags any overdue or rooms that have gone too long without a PM cycle. Use this if a room has ever gone a full year without its scheduled HVAC or safety check because it only got attention when something broke.

jobs.name: Route Load Optimization Check
jobs.description: Checks planned truckload trailer fill rates and flags loads shipping significantly under capacity. Use this if a half-empty trailer has ever gone out the door because nobody checked fill rate before dispatch, paying full linehaul cost for a fraction of the freight.

jobs.name: Royalty Statement Due Check
jobs.description: Warns you before a royalty statement and payment is due to an author or co-author. Use this if a royalty statement has ever gone out late (or didn't go out at all) because the payout schedule wasn't tracked anywhere.

jobs.name: Podcast RSS Feed Health Check
jobs.description: Checks that your podcast's RSS feed is reachable and still valid XML with the required podcast tags. Use this if a feed has ever silently broken (bad edit, hosting hiccup, malformed enclosure) and stopped new episodes from reaching Apple Podcasts or Spotify for days before anyone noticed.

jobs.name: RSS Feed Validation
jobs.description: Checks your RSS/Atom feed is valid XML and shows the most recent item's publish date. Use this if you've ever shipped a broken feed and only found out when a reader's app stopped updating.

jobs.name: RSS-to-Social Repurpose Draft
jobs.description: Checks your blog/RSS feed for new posts and drafts a set of social posts repurposing each one, instead of publishing and moving on without ever promoting it. Use this if you've ever shipped a blog post and then simply forgot to tell anyone it existed.

jobs.name: RSVP Follow-up Reminder
jobs.description: Flags invitees who haven't RSVP'd as the event date gets close. Use this if you've ever had to guess headcount because half the guest list never replied and nobody chased them.

jobs.name: S3 Public Bucket Check
jobs.description: Checks your S3 buckets for public access and flags any that are exposed. Use this if a misconfigured bucket policy has ever quietly made private data public.

jobs.name: Team SaaS Seat Audit
jobs.description: Flags team SaaS seats (Slack, Notion, GitHub, etc.) nobody's actually used in a while. Use this if you suspect you're paying for seats of people who left or tools nobody opens anymore.

jobs.name: Safety Equipment Operator Certification Expiry Check
jobs.description: Warns before an operator's certification for safety-sensitive equipment (forklift, overhead crane, powered industrial truck, etc.) expires. Use this if an uncertified operator has ever kept running equipment for weeks because nobody was tracking cert expiry dates against the roster.

jobs.name: Health & Safety Inspection Due Reminder
jobs.description: Warns before a health department, board-of-cosmetology, or fire/safety inspection is expected, based on your jurisdiction's typical interval. Use this if an inspector has ever shown up to a treatment room that wasn't ready because nobody was tracking when the last inspection happened.

jobs.name: Sales Per Square Foot Tracker
jobs.description: Calculates each store's sales-per-square-foot for the period and flags stores falling below a benchmark. Use this if underperforming store footprints have ever gone unnoticed until an annual real-estate review instead of getting flagged while there was still time to act.

jobs.name: School Bus Route On-Time Check
jobs.description: Reviews bus route arrival data and flags routes that are consistently running late. Use this if a route has ever drifted later and later over weeks with only individual parent complaints, never a pattern anyone actually looked at.

jobs.name: Scrap and Waste Rate Watch
jobs.description: Tracks scrapped material as a percentage of total material consumed and flags it when it runs above target. Use this if scrap has ever crept up gradually until it showed up as a surprise hit to material cost at month-end.

jobs.name: Screen Time Check
jobs.description: Checks today's screen time against a goal and tells you if you're over. Use this if you're trying to cut down on screen time but never actually look at the stats your phone/laptop already collects.

jobs.name: Seasonal Staffing Coverage Check
jobs.description: Compares scheduled labor hours against a forecasted seasonal-peak staffing plan and flags stores that are under-scheduled. Use this if a store has ever gone into a holiday or back-to-school rush understaffed because the seasonal plan and the actual schedule quietly drifted apart.

jobs.name: Seat Utilization Upsell Check
jobs.description: Flags accounts that are using most or all of their purchased seats, a strong signal they're about to hit a limit. Use this if you've ever found out an account outgrew its plan only after they complained about being locked out of adding a new user.

jobs.name: Committed Secrets Scan
jobs.description: Scans a repo for accidentally committed API keys, tokens, and private keys. Use this if you want a safety net for the "oops, committed a key" mistake everyone makes eventually.

jobs.name: Security Deposit Return Deadline Check
jobs.description: Flags move-outs where the statutory deadline to return the security deposit (or an itemized deduction statement) is approaching or has passed. Use this if a deposit has ever gone back late and triggered a penalty claim or small-claims dispute because nobody was tracking the move-out date against the legal return window.

jobs.name: SEO Meta Tag Check
jobs.description: Checks a list of pages for missing title, meta description, and Open Graph tags. Use this if pages have ever shipped without basic SEO/social-preview tags because nobody double-checked.

jobs.name: SEO Keyword Rank Drop Watch
jobs.description: Checks a tracked keyword's search ranking and flags a real drop. Use this if a page has ever slipped off page one and nobody noticed until organic traffic was already down for weeks.

jobs.name: Service Appointment No-Show Tracker
jobs.description: Checks today's service appointment schedule partway through the day and flags customers who booked a slot but never checked in, so the bay can be reopened to a walk-in instead of sitting empty. Use this if a bay has ever sat idle all morning because a no-show was never noticed until the tech asked what happened to their 9 o'clock.

jobs.name: Service Bay Utilization Check
jobs.description: Checks each service bay's scheduled hours against its available hours for the day and flags bays running well under or over target utilization. Use this if a shop has ever had techs standing around on one side of the floor while the other side is double-booked, and nobody noticed until the day was already gone.

jobs.name: Service Ticket Churn Risk Review
jobs.description: Reviews customers with repeated service tickets in a recent window and drafts a churn-risk summary with recommended outreach. Use this if a customer has ever quietly churned after their third outage ticket because nobody connected the dots between separate complaints.

jobs.name: Settlement Payment Schedule Tracker
jobs.description: Checks scheduled settlement agreement installment payments — both owed and owed to you — and flags anything due soon or missed. Use this if a settlement installment has ever been paid late (risking default terms kicking back in) or received late without anyone noticing until the next reconciliation.

jobs.name: Shift Handoff Report
jobs.description: Pulls the outgoing shift's production, downtime, and open-issue notes and drafts a handoff summary for the incoming shift lead. Use this if an incoming shift has ever started blind because the handoff was a rushed hallway conversation instead of something written down.

jobs.name: Warehouse Shift Headcount Coverage Check
jobs.description: Compares scheduled headcount against required headcount per shift and flags gaps before the shift starts. Use this if a shift has ever started three people short with no time left to call in coverage, because the staffing gap wasn't checked until people were already clocking in.

jobs.name: Shipment Delay Watch
jobs.description: Checks a shipment's tracking status and flags it if it hasn't moved in a while. Use this if a stuck shipment has ever gone unnoticed until a customer asked where their order was.

jobs.name: Shipping Delay Check
jobs.description: Checks shipped orders against their expected delivery date and flags anything running late. Use this if a customer has ever emailed asking "where's my order" before you had any idea it was already late.

jobs.name: Shop Supply & Consumables Reorder Check
jobs.description: Checks bulk shop consumables (shop towels, degreaser, disposable gloves, oil dry, bulk fluids) against reorder thresholds and flags anything running low. Use this if a tech has ever had to stop mid-job because the shop ran out of a supply nobody tracks as closely as billable parts.

jobs.name: Sitemap Freshness Check
jobs.description: Checks that your sitemap.xml was actually regenerated recently and isn't quietly stuck on an old snapshot. Use this if your sitemap is generated by a build step that's ever silently failed or skipped.

jobs.name: SIU Fraud Referral Tracker
jobs.description: Checks claims referred to the Special Investigations Unit for suspected fraud and flags any referral that hasn't been triaged or closed within the target window. Use this if a fraud-flagged claim has ever sat in an SIU queue for months with no documented outcome.

jobs.name: SLA Breach Warning
jobs.description: Flags open tickets that are about to breach their SLA, before they actually do. Use this if a ticket has ever blown past its SLA with zero warning because the only check was after the fact.

jobs.name: SLA Uptime Breach Tracker
jobs.description: Compares each customer's measured monthly uptime percentage against their contracted SLA and flags anyone below threshold. Use this if you've ever missed an SLA credit obligation because nobody totaled up the downtime minutes until the customer's lawyer did.

jobs.name: Slotting Velocity Review Check
jobs.description: Reviews SKU pick-frequency data against current storage locations and flags fast-movers stuck in slow-to-reach slots (or slow-movers hogging prime golden-zone real estate). Use this if pickers have ever walked past empty golden-zone slots to reach a high-velocity SKU stashed in the back corner because the slotting plan was never revisited after demand shifted.

jobs.name: Smart Contract Upgrade/Deprecation Watch
jobs.description: Watches a tracked smart contract's on-chain events and any linked project announcements for upgrades, migrations, or deprecation notices. Use this if a protocol you depend on has ever migrated to a new contract address and you found out only after something broke.

jobs.name: Smoke Detector Battery Check Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you to test/replace smoke detector batteries on a schedule. Use this if the only time you think about smoke detectors is when one starts chirping at 3am.

jobs.name: Social Mentions Watch
jobs.description: Scans for recent mentions of your brand, product, or repo and summarizes them. Use this if you want to catch a complaint or bug report on social media before it turns into a bigger problem.

jobs.name: Speaker Confirmation Deadline Check
jobs.description: Checks the speaker/presenter list against each person's confirm-by date and flags anyone who hasn't confirmed yet. Use this if an event has ever gotten close with a session slot still unconfirmed and nobody noticed until the program had to go to print.

jobs.name: Podcast Sponsor Deliverable Tracker
jobs.description: Flags sponsor deliverables (read, mention, social post) coming due. Use this if you've ever had a sponsor follow up asking where their promised mention was.

jobs.name: Sponsorship Deliverable Tracker
jobs.description: Flags brand-deal deliverables (a video, post, story, or link placement) coming due across whatever platforms you post on. Use this if a sponsor has ever had to ask where their promised content was because the deadline only lived in an email thread from weeks ago.

jobs.name: SSL Certificate Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks how many days are left before a website's SSL certificate expires. Use this if you run a site and want a warning before the padlock breaks and visitors start seeing browser security errors.

jobs.name: Stablecoin Peg Deviation Watch
jobs.description: Checks a stablecoin's market price against its $1 peg and alerts when it drifts beyond your threshold. Use this if you've ever held a "stable" balance through a depeg event because nothing was watching the price.

jobs.name: Childcare Staff Certification Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks staff CPR/first-aid and other required childcare certifications and warns before any expire. Use this if a licensing inspection has ever been the first place a lapsed certification got noticed, instead of catching it with time to renew.

jobs.name: Staff-to-Child Ratio Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks each classroom/group's staff-to-child ratio for the day against your licensing requirement and flags anything out of compliance. Use this if a ratio has ever slipped out of compliance mid-shift because someone called in sick and nobody recalculated the numbers.

jobs.name: Staff CME Credit Tracking
jobs.description: Checks each clinician's continuing medical education (CME) credit hours completed against what's required by their cycle end date and warns before anyone falls short. Use this if a provider has ever discovered close to renewal that they were short on CME hours needed to keep their license active — distinct from license-credential-expiry-check, which tracks the license's own expiry date rather than the ongoing education requirement to renew it.

jobs.name: Staging vs Production Config Diff
jobs.description: Diffs environment variable keys between staging and production and flags mismatches. Use this if staging and prod have ever quietly drifted apart until a deploy broke only in one of them.

jobs.name: Stale Deal Nudge
jobs.description: Finds open pipeline deals nobody's touched in a while. Use this if deals have ever quietly died in "in progress" because follow-up only happens when someone remembers.

jobs.name: Stale Dependency PR Nudge
jobs.description: Lists open dependency-bump pull requests (from Dependabot/Renovate) that have been sitting for a while. Use this if automated PRs pile up and quietly go stale instead of getting merged or closed.

jobs.name: Stale Post Audit
jobs.description: Flags published posts that haven't been touched in a long time, as candidates for a refresh. Use this if old content quietly rots (dead screenshots, outdated advice) while still ranking and getting traffic.

jobs.name: Stale Todo Sweep
jobs.description: Finds TODO/FIXME comments in your codebase that have sat untouched for a long time, so you can decide whether to fix, ticket, or delete them. Use this if TODO comments in this repo have basically become permanent decor.

jobs.name: Standardized Test Registration Deadline Check
