jobs.description: Warns before the registration cutoff for a standardized test (state assessment, AP, SAT, etc.). Use this if a student has ever missed the window to register for a test because the deadline landed during a busy stretch of the term and nobody flagged it in advance.

jobs.name: Store Closing Checklist Compliance Check
jobs.description: Reviews logged closing checklist completions and flags stores or shifts that skipped required steps, rather than just reminding staff of the checklist. Use this if a store has ever opened the next morning to a safe left unlocked, alarm not set, or cash not dropped because closing execution was never actually checked afterward.

jobs.name: Store Opening Checklist Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds the opening shift of the standard opening checklist every day, not just when a manager happens to be on site to run it from memory. Use this if the store has ever opened late, or opened with something missed (lights, POS not booted, signage not out), because the checklist lived only in one person's head.

jobs.name: Storefront SSL & Domain Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks your storefront's SSL certificate and domain registration expiry dates and flags anything expiring soon. Use this if your store has ever gone down — or thrown a scary browser security warning at checkout — because an SSL cert or domain renewal quietly lapsed.

jobs.name: Stream Schedule Prep Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you before a scheduled stream and checks that your streaming software/overlays are up to date. Use this if you've ever gone live late because you were still fighting an OBS update mid-countdown.

jobs.name: Subcontractor Insurance (COI) Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks tracked subcontractor certificates of insurance and warns before any expire. Use this if a sub has ever kept working on site after their COI lapsed, leaving the general contractor exposed if something went wrong.

jobs.name: Subcontractor Pay Application Approval Tracker
jobs.description: Flags subcontractor pay applications (AIA G702/G703-style draw requests) that are still waiting on GC or owner approval past the normal turnaround, separate from the retainage that eventually gets held back on approved amounts. Use this if a sub has ever gone weeks without payment because their draw request just sat unreviewed in someone's queue.

jobs.name: Submittal / Shop Drawing Review Check
jobs.description: Reviews the submittal log for shop drawings, product data, and samples sitting past their review due date, and spot-checks whether returned reviews actually addressed the spec section they were submitted against. Use this if a submittal has ever come back "approved" from a quick rubber stamp that missed a spec conflict, only to surface as a costly field problem later.

jobs.name: Subrogation Recovery Tracker
jobs.description: Checks open subrogation files against at-fault third parties and flags ones with no recovery activity in a while, so pursuit doesn't quietly stall until the statute of limitations closes the door. Use this if a recoverable claim has ever gone unpursued long enough to lose the chance at reimbursement entirely.

jobs.name: Subscriber/Follower Churn Watch
jobs.description: Checks your channel's subscriber or follower count trend and flags a meaningful drop so you can investigate before it becomes a pattern. Use this if you've ever noticed a slow bleed of subscribers only after checking your dashboard months later.

jobs.name: Subscription Audit
jobs.description: Flags recurring subscriptions you haven't actually used in a while. Use this if you suspect you're paying for things you forgot to cancel.

jobs.name: Subscription Price Hike Watch
jobs.description: Checks a tracked subscription's current price against the last price you recorded and flags any increase. Use this if a service has ever quietly raised its price and you only noticed months later scrolling through a bank statement.

jobs.name: Substitute Teacher Fill Rate Tracker
jobs.description: Compares substitute requests against how many were actually filled and flags days or schools with a low fill rate. Use this if classes have ever gone uncovered because nobody was tracking whether sub requests were actually getting filled.

jobs.name: Sudo Usage Audit
jobs.description: Reports new sudo commands run since the last check. Use this if you want to notice unexpected privilege escalation on a shared or internet-facing server.

jobs.name: Supplier Lead Time Drift Check
jobs.description: Compares each supplier's recent delivery lead time against their historical baseline and flags suppliers who have started shipping noticeably slower. Use this if a reorder point has ever gone stale because a supplier quietly started taking longer to deliver than they used to.

jobs.name: Supplier On-Time Delivery Performance Watch
jobs.description: Tracks a supplier's on-time delivery rate over recent orders and flags it when performance drops below target. Use this if a supplier's reliability has ever quietly slipped for months before it showed up as a production delay bad enough to notice.

jobs.name: Supplier Price Increase Watch
jobs.description: Compares this week's supplier invoice prices against your reference cost sheet and flags ingredients that jumped more than a set percentage. Use this if a supplier has ever quietly raised prices for months before anyone noticed the food cost creeping up.

jobs.name: Supplier Quality PPM Watch
jobs.description: Calculates each supplier's defect rate in parts-per-million from incoming inspection records and flags anyone above target. Use this if a supplier's defective parts have ever slipped through in small enough numbers each month that no one noticed the trend until a batch got bad enough to stop the line.

jobs.name: Surgery Prep Check
jobs.description: Checks tomorrow's scheduled surgeries for missing pre-op bloodwork or signed consent forms. Use this if a surgery has ever had to be rescheduled the morning of because consent wasn't signed or bloodwork hadn't been run, and nobody checked the night before.

jobs.name: Table Turnover Rate Tracker
jobs.description: Analyzes seating and table-clear timestamps to calculate average table turnover time by section, day, and shift, and flags where tables are sitting occupied well past the typical dining window. Use this if you suspect one section or server is quietly slowing down the whole dining room's throughput on busy nights.

jobs.name: Tax Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you ahead of upcoming tax deadlines you've listed. Use this if quarterly estimated payments or annual filing dates have ever snuck up on you.

jobs.name: Tax-Loss Harvesting Review
jobs.description: Checks your holdings for unrealized losses worth considering for tax-loss harvesting before year-end. Use this if you've ever realized in December that a position had been sitting at a loss all year and you never did anything about it for tax purposes.

jobs.name: Teacher Certification Expiry Tracker
jobs.description: Checks teaching certifications and endorsements against their renewal dates and flags anything expiring soon. Use this if a teacher has ever had their state license lapse mid-year because the renewal deadline wasn't on anyone's radar until an audit or licensing-board notice.

jobs.name: Team Anniversary Reminder
jobs.description: Reminds you about teammates' birthdays and work anniversaries coming up this week. Use this if you've ever felt bad realizing a work anniversary passed with zero acknowledgment.

jobs.name: Tech ETA No-Show Check
jobs.description: Checks today's dispatch log for jobs where the technician's promised arrival window has passed with no check-in logged. Use this if a customer has ever called asking where the tech is before dispatch even noticed the appointment was running late.

jobs.name: Tech License & Certification Renewal Check
jobs.description: Checks technician licenses and certifications (EPA 608, journeyman electrician, plumbing license) against their expiration date and flags any expiring soon. Use this if a tech has ever been pulled off a job, or a permit rejected, because their certification quietly lapsed without anyone tracking the renewal date.

jobs.name: Telehealth Session No-Show/Tech-Failure Check
jobs.description: Reviews recent telehealth appointments for no-shows and technical-failure disconnects, and flags patients hitting either problem repeatedly. Use this if a telehealth visit has ever quietly failed to happen — patient never joined, or the call dropped and was never rebooked — with nobody tracking it the way an in-person no-show would normally get tracked.

jobs.name: Tenant Application Review Backlog Check
jobs.description: Flags rental applications that have been sitting in review too long without a decision. Use this if a good applicant has ever gone with a different landlord because your screening process sat on their application for a week before anyone looked at it.

jobs.name: Tenant Renters Insurance Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks tenants required by their lease to carry renters insurance against their certificate's expiration date and flags anyone lapsed or about to lapse. Use this if a tenant's coverage has ever quietly expired mid-lease, leaving the landlord exposed on a liability claim the lease was supposed to cover.

jobs.name: Terraform Drift Check
jobs.description: Runs a Terraform plan and flags it if there's drift between your state and actual infrastructure. Use this if you've ever had someone click around in a cloud console and quietly break parity with your IaC.

jobs.name: Territory Coverage Gap Check
jobs.description: Flags target accounts that have no assigned rep, or have an assigned rep but no logged activity in a long time. Use this if an account has ever gone completely unworked for months simply because it fell between territory reassignments and nobody noticed the gap.

jobs.name: Textbook Inventory Shortage Check
jobs.description: Compares textbook/material stock counts against enrolled class sizes and flags courses that are short. Use this if a class has ever started the term with more students than available textbooks because nobody checked inventory against the roster ahead of time.

jobs.name: Support Ticket Backlog Aging Check
jobs.description: Checks how many open support tickets have sat unanswered past your SLA window. Use this if tickets have ever quietly aged past their SLA because the backlog view wasn't checked that day.

jobs.name: Ticket Reopened Rate Watch
jobs.description: Checks what percentage of closed tickets get reopened and flags it when the rate climbs — a quality signal that's different from SLA or backlog size. Use this if tickets have ever been closed to hit a metric and quietly bounced right back, without anyone tracking the reopen rate itself.

jobs.name: Timekeeper Billable Hours Compliance Check
jobs.description: Checks attorneys and paralegals against their weekly timesheet submission and minimum billable-hour targets, and flags anyone missing or short. Use this if unbilled time has ever quietly leaked out of a matter because a timekeeper fell behind on entering hours and nobody caught it before the billing cycle closed.

jobs.name: Timezone Meeting Conflict Check
jobs.description: Checks tomorrow's meetings against a remote teammate's working hours and flags any that fall outside them. Use this if a meeting has ever gotten scheduled at 11pm for someone across the world without anyone realizing.

jobs.name: Tire Wear & Replacement Check
jobs.description: Checks tread depth readings against a safe minimum and flags tires approaching replacement. Use this if a fleet vehicle has ever failed a roadside inspection, or blown a tire on the road, because tread wear was only checked at annual service instead of tracked between visits.

jobs.name: Weak TLS Cipher/Protocol Check
jobs.description: Checks a host for weak TLS protocol versions or ciphers still enabled. Use this if a legacy protocol has ever stayed enabled for "just in case" long after every client that needed it was gone.

jobs.name: Token Unlock/Vesting Watch
jobs.description: Checks for upcoming token unlock or vesting cliff dates for a project you're tracking and warns before a large unlock hits. Use this if a token has ever dropped sharply right after an unlock you didn't see coming.

jobs.name: Toll & Parking Violation Tracker
jobs.description: Flags unpaid tolls and parking citations against fleet vehicles before they escalate into late fees, registration holds, or collections. Use this if a parking ticket has ever turned into a much bigger bill because it sat unnoticed until a renewal got blocked.

jobs.name: Tooling and Die Wear Check
jobs.description: Tracks cycle counts against a tool or die's rated life and flags it when it's approaching end-of-life. Use this if a worn die has ever kept running past its rated cycle count until it started producing bad parts nobody traced back to the tooling.

jobs.name: Tournament Registration Deadline Check
jobs.description: Warns you before a tournament's registration window closes. Use this if you've ever missed signing up for a tournament because the deadline passed while you were heads-down practicing instead of checking dates.

jobs.name: Trade-In Appraisal Variance Check
jobs.description: Compares trade-in vehicles' initial appraised value against their actual wholesale/auction sale price once sold, and flags appraisers or vehicle categories with a consistent gap. Use this if trade-in appraisals have ever quietly run high (or low) for months before anyone lined them up against what the cars actually brought at auction.

jobs.name: Trademark Infringement Watch
jobs.description: Searches for new trademark applications, domain registrations, and marketplace listings that look like they could infringe on your registered marks, and summarizes anything worth a closer look. Use this if you've ever found out about a confusingly similar competitor mark or copycat domain months after it started causing customer confusion, instead of when it first appeared.

jobs.name: Trademark Renewal Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a trademark registration's renewal deadline. Use this if you've ever let a trademark lapse simply because the renewal date wasn't on anyone's calendar.

jobs.name: Trainer Session Package Expiry Check
jobs.description: Flags members with a paid personal-training session package that's expiring soon with sessions still unused. Use this if a client has ever paid for ten sessions, used three, and let the rest expire because nobody nudged them to book before the window closed.

jobs.name: Transcript Publish Lag Check
jobs.description: Flags episodes that published without a transcript still missing after a grace period. Use this if you've ever promised accessible, searchable transcripts but had episodes quietly sit for weeks without one.

jobs.name: Travel Insurance Expiry Check
jobs.description: Warns you if you have an upcoming trip with no travel insurance policy covering it, or a policy expiring before the trip ends. Use this if you've ever booked a trip and only thought about insurance the night before.

jobs.name: Trial Expiring Nudge
jobs.description: Finds trial users about to expire who haven't upgraded yet, and can draft the nudge email. Use this if trial-to-paid conversion nudges only happen when someone remembers to send them.

jobs.name: Tuition Payment Late Check
jobs.description: Flags families whose tuition payment is overdue past the grace period. Use this if a late payment has ever gone unnoticed for weeks because nobody was cross-checking the payment ledger against who'd actually paid.

jobs.name: Tuition Payment Plan Delinquency Check
jobs.description: Checks tuition installment plans against their due dates and flags accounts that have missed a payment. Use this if a family has ever fallen behind on a payment plan for weeks before anyone in the office noticed and followed up.

jobs.name: Underwriting Queue SLA Monitor
jobs.description: Checks pending underwriting submissions against the target turnaround-time SLA and flags any that are approaching or past it. Use this if a broker submission has ever sat in an underwriter's queue for weeks with no decision because nobody was watching the clock.

jobs.name: Unpaid Invoice Aging Check
jobs.description: Checks invoices issued after completed jobs against their due date and flags any going unpaid past your collection threshold. Use this if cash has ever gotten tight because completed jobs sat uncollected for weeks with nobody following up on payment.

jobs.name: Unresolved Callback Tracker
jobs.description: Flags customer callbacks (a return visit for the same issue within the warranty window) that are still open past a set number of days. Use this if a rework job has ever slipped through the cracks and the customer had to call a second time to get it actually fixed.

jobs.name: Room Upsell and Upgrade Conversion Tracker
jobs.description: Analyzes offered room upgrades and add-on upsells (early check-in, view upgrade, breakfast package) against how many guests accepted, broken down by channel and shift. Use this if front desk upsell offers have ever quietly tapered off because nobody was tracking whether the team was actually still asking.

jobs.name: Uptime Ping Check
jobs.description: Pings a URL on a schedule and flags it if it stops responding. Use this if you want a basic "is my site down" alert without paying for a monitoring service.

jobs.name: Used Vehicle Inventory Aging Check
jobs.description: Checks used vehicle inventory against days-on-lot and flags anything past your reconditioning or pricing review threshold. Use this if a used car has ever sat on the lot for two months quietly losing value before anyone noticed it needed a price cut.

jobs.name: Utility Bill Anomaly Check
jobs.description: Compares each newly logged utility bill against your recent average for that utility and flags a reading that spikes well beyond normal. Use this if a bill has ever jumped because of a hidden leak or a device left running, and you only found out once the bill arrived.

jobs.name: Utility Bill-Back Reconciliation Check
jobs.description: Compares submetered tenant utility charges against the property's master utility bill and flags a mismatch beyond a set tolerance. Use this if tenant bill-backs have ever quietly drifted from the actual master bill, either undercharging the owner or overcharging tenants.

jobs.name: Vehicle Idle Time Check
jobs.description: Checks each vehicle's daily engine idle time against a threshold and flags the ones burning excess fuel sitting still. Use this if a telematics report has ever shown a surprise fuel bill and nobody could tell how much of it came from vehicles just left running.

jobs.name: Vehicle State/DOT Inspection Due Check
jobs.description: Checks fleet vehicles against their state or DOT inspection due dates and warns before any lapse. Use this if a vehicle has ever gotten pulled off a job by an inspector because its inspection sticker quietly expired — separate from routine maintenance or registration renewal.

jobs.name: Fleet Vehicle Maintenance Due Check
jobs.description: Flags fleet vehicles due for scheduled maintenance by date or mileage. Use this if a fleet vehicle has ever broken down on a job because its service interval quietly passed.

jobs.name: Finished Vehicle Pickup Reminder
jobs.description: Flags vehicles marked ready for pickup that the customer hasn't collected yet, so the lot doesn't fill up with finished cars nobody's chasing. Use this if a completed car has ever sat in the lot for a week because the "ready" call was made once and then forgotten.

jobs.name: Vehicle Pool Scheduling Conflict Check
jobs.description: Scans upcoming pool vehicle reservations for double-bookings and flags overlaps before two employees show up for the same vehicle. Use this if a pool vehicle has ever been double-booked because reservations were tracked in a shared calendar or spreadsheet with no overlap check.

jobs.name: Fleet Vehicle Registration Expiry Check
jobs.description: Warns you before a fleet vehicle's registration expires. Use this if a vehicle has ever gotten pulled over, or failed a job site check-in, because its registration quietly lapsed.

jobs.name: Vehicle Total Cost of Ownership Tracker
jobs.description: Reviews each vehicle's running cost per mile (fuel, maintenance, insurance, depreciation) against a threshold and flags vehicles that have quietly become more expensive to keep than to replace. Use this if an aging vehicle has ever stayed on the road years past the point it made financial sense.

jobs.name: Vehicle Utilization Rate Check
jobs.description: Flags fleet vehicles running well below or above a target utilization rate (miles or days driven per period). Use this if a vehicle has ever sat mostly idle in a lot racking up lease and insurance costs while another vehicle got run into the ground.

jobs.name: Vendor Certificate of Insurance Expiry Tracker
jobs.description: Checks certificates of insurance you've collected from vendors and contractors and warns before any expire, so a lapsed COI doesn't sit unnoticed in the file. Use this if a vendor's insurance has ever lapsed mid-contract and nobody found out until a claim needed it.

jobs.name: Vendor Early-Pay Discount Tracker
jobs.description: Flags vendor invoices with an early-payment discount (like "2/10 net 30") whose discount window is about to close. Use this if you've ever paid a bill on the regular due date and only afterward realized you could've saved a couple percent by paying ten days earlier.

jobs.name: Event Vendor Payment Deadline Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before a vendor deposit or balance payment for an event is due. Use this if a vendor has ever threatened to cancel because a payment deadline slipped past unnoticed.

jobs.name: VIP Tier Reclassification Check
jobs.description: Checks each customer's year-to-date spend against your VIP tier thresholds and flags anyone due to move up or down a tier, drafting a short outreach note for new upgrades. Use this if a top customer has ever crossed your VIP spend threshold months ago and never got the perks (or the acknowledgment) because nobody was tracking tier crossings.

jobs.name: Visa/Residency Document Expiry Check
jobs.description: Warns you before a visa, residency permit, or similar document expires. Use this if you're living or working abroad and a document deadline has ever crept up on you.

jobs.name: Visual Merchandising Compliance Check
jobs.description: Reviews store-front and window display photos against the current visual merchandising directive and flags stores that haven't executed it. Use this if a seasonal window or entrance display has ever stayed up stale for weeks after corporate sent the new directive.

jobs.name: Volunteer Hours Shortfall Check
jobs.description: Compares logged volunteer hours against a program's target and flags a shortfall. Use this if a program has ever fallen behind on a grant's volunteer-hour commitment without anyone noticing until the report was due.

jobs.name: WAF Rule Change Watch
jobs.description: Diffs your current WAF rules against a saved baseline and flags drift. Use this if a WAF rule has ever been loosened "just for testing" and never put back.

jobs.name: Waitlist-to-Seated Conversion Check
jobs.description: Analyzes waitlist app data to see what share of people who joined the waitlist actually got seated versus walked away, and whether quoted wait times matched reality. Use this if you suspect an overly optimistic quoted wait time is quietly driving guests to leave before their table is ready.

jobs.name: Walk-In Cooler Temperature Log Check
jobs.description: Scans today's logged cooler/freezer temperature readings and flags any that fall outside the safe range. Use this if an out-of-range reading has ever sat unnoticed in a paper log until a health inspector found it.

jobs.name: Wallet Balance Watch
jobs.description: Checks a public wallet address's balance and alerts if it drops below a threshold, without needing any private key or exchange API access. Use this if you've ever wanted a heads-up when a hot wallet's gas/funding balance ran low.

jobs.name: Warehouse Damage Write-Off Review
jobs.description: Reviews inventory damaged inside the facility during handling (dropped in putaway, forklift contact, racking collapse) and flags cases pending a write-off decision, along with any recurring cause worth fixing. Use this if damaged inventory has ever sat on a "to be reviewed" pallet for weeks because nobody owned the write-off decision.

jobs.name: Warehouse Near-Miss & Incident Rate Watch
jobs.description: Reviews the safety incident log for a trend in near-misses and minor injuries on the warehouse floor against a rolling benchmark, and looks for a common thread (location, shift, equipment) before it becomes a serious injury. Use this if near-misses have ever piled up in the log unread until a lost-time injury made someone finally go looking for a pattern that was there the whole time.

jobs.name: Warehouse Space Utilization Check
jobs.description: Reviews storage location occupancy against total capacity by zone and flags zones running near overflow or sitting oddly empty. Use this if a zone has ever hit effective capacity without warning, forcing overflow pallets into aisles because nobody was watching utilization trend toward full.

jobs.name: Warranty Claim Deadline Check
jobs.description: Checks open warranty claims against the manufacturer's submission deadline and flags any about to expire unfiled. Use this if a claim has ever gone unpaid because it was submitted a day past the manufacturer's filing window.

jobs.name: Warranty Claim Expiry Check
jobs.description: Checks open equipment warranty claims (HVAC units, water heaters, appliances) against the manufacturer's filing deadline and flags any about to lapse unfiled. Use this if a claim has ever been denied because it was submitted a day after the manufacturer's window closed.

jobs.name: Warranty Expiry Reminder
jobs.description: Warns you before an appliance or product warranty expires. Use this if you've ever discovered a warranty lapsed the week before whatever it covered broke.

jobs.name: Water Intake Reminder
jobs.description: Nudges you to drink water a few times a day toward a daily goal. Use this if you sit at a desk all day and forget to drink water until you've got a headache.

jobs.name: Wave/Batch Picking Efficiency Check
jobs.description: Checks completed picking waves against a target completion time and flags waves that ran long. Use this if a wave has ever spilled past its window and pushed the whole outbound schedule back before anyone noticed the wave itself, not the individual pickers, was the problem.

jobs.name: Weather Delay Impact Log
jobs.description: Reviews logged weather delay days against the project's schedule float and flags when accumulated weather delays threaten a milestone, plus checks whether the delay documentation is complete enough to support a time-extension claim later. Use this if a weather delay claim has ever been rejected because the daily documentation didn't clearly tie the weather to lost work.

jobs.name: Frost/Freeze Risk Alert
jobs.description: Checks the forecast for your fields and warns if frost or freeze temperatures are coming, so you have time to cover crops or run frost-protection irrigation. Use this if a surprise cold snap has ever cost you a harvest.

jobs.name: Webinar Attendance Reminder
jobs.description: Checks a list of webinars/workshops you've registered for and flags any happening soon so you can block the time and prep. Use this if you've ever signed up for a webinar and completely forgotten about it by the time it started.

jobs.name: Weekly Progress Report
jobs.description: Rolls up a week's worth of commits and progress into a short report you can hand to your team. Use this if you dread writing the Friday status update from scratch every week.

jobs.name: Welcome Email Drip Check
jobs.description: Checks that everyone who signed up recently actually received the welcome email, and flags anyone who fell through the cracks. Use this if a welcome-email automation has ever silently failed for a batch of new users and nobody noticed until support tickets started asking "where's my onboarding email?"

jobs.name: Wishlist Abandonment Check
jobs.description: Checks customer wishlists for items that have sat untouched for a while and drafts a nudge email when there's a real reason to reach out — a price drop or the item is back in stock — instead of a generic "you still want this?" reminder. Use this if you've ever had a wishlist feature that quietly collects intent and never converts any of it back into a sale.

jobs.name: WMS Integration Error Queue Check
jobs.description: Scans the warehouse management system's integration error queue (failed order imports, ASN mismatches, inventory sync failures) and flags anything sitting unresolved past a target age. Use this if a failed inbound order sync has ever sat quietly in an error queue for days while the warehouse floor had no idea the order even existed.

jobs.name: Work Order Backlog Check
jobs.description: Counts open production work orders that have sat unstarted or unfinished past their planned completion date. Use this if a work order has ever quietly aged for weeks in the queue while everyone assumed someone else had picked it up.

jobs.name: Workers' Comp Claim Status Check
jobs.description: Checks open workers' compensation claims with the carrier and flags ones that have gone quiet or are approaching an expected return-to-work date with no update. Use this if an injured employee's claim has ever stalled with the carrier for weeks with nobody at the company noticing or following up.

jobs.name: Yard Trailer Detention Watch
jobs.description: Checks trailers currently parked in the facility's own yard against their free-time window and flags any at risk of detention charges. Use this if a trailer has ever sat in the yard so long that a detention invoice showed up before anyone realized it was still parked out there.

jobs.name: YouTube Clip Repurposing Draft
jobs.description: Checks for a newly published long-form video and drafts a shortlist of moments worth cutting into shorts/clips for other platforms. Use this if a video has ever gone up and just sat there as one long upload instead of becoming five pieces of content.
